title: Able Assess User Guide
description: A step-by-step guide to navigating the Able Assess mobile app for grip assessments, with a downloadable PDF resource.
author: Dr Paul Rinne
excerpt: Welcome to Able Assess, the mobile platform for grip assessments. This is your step-by-step guide to help you navigate all the areas of the Able Assess App.
content:
Able Assess User Guide

Welcome to Able Assess, the mobile platform for grip assessments. This is your step-by-step guide to help you navigate all the areas of the Able Assess App. Please click 'Download Resource' for the Able Assess user guide.

Download Resource

If you have any questions please contact: support@able-care.co
